title: Lo-Fi Cafe Jazz
summary: Laid-back 84 BPM cafe instrumental with smooth jazz guitar, Rhodes, and mellow saxophone.
prompt: A laid-back lo-fi cafe instrumental at 84 BPM. Smooth jazz guitar chords, warm Rhodes piano comping, mellow saxophone melody on top, soft brushed snare and kick groove, light upright bass. Hint of cafe ambience, gentle vinyl warmth. Effortless and inviting, like a Sunday brunch playlist.
